description: Add SuperGrok OAuth provider mode to the xAI provider, including OAuth configuration, authorization code flow with PKCE, token exchange, credential storage, token refresh logic, and xAI executor for SuperGrok OAuth connections. Also add xAI image generation support to imageGenerationCore.
steps: 1. Add SuperGrok OAuth config in src/lib/oauth/constants/oauth.tsx: SUPERGROK_CONFIG with clientId='b1a00492-073a-47ea-816f-4c329264a828', authorizeUrl='https://auth.x.ai/oauth2/authorize', tokenUrl='https://auth.x.ai/oauth2/token', scope='openid profile email offline_access grok-cli:access api:access', codeChallengeMethod='S256'. Export it.

2. Add 'supergrok' provider entry in src/lib/oauth/providers.ts (the PROVIDERS object) with flowType='authorization_code_pkce', buildAuthUrl, exchangeToken (POST form-urlencoded to token endpoint), and mapTokens (map access_token, refresh_token, expires_in, extract email from JWT). This handles the interactive browser callback flow.
3. Add SuperGrok OAuth endpoint constants in open-sse/config/appConstants.ts: OAUTH_ENDPOINTS.supergrok = { token: 'https://auth.x.ai/oauth2/token', auth: 'https://auth.x.ai/oauth2/authorize' }.

4. Update open-sse/config/providers.ts: add a 'supergrok' entry (alias for xai with OAuth) OR modify the existing 'xai' entry to support OAuth mode. Since the task says to keep provider ID as 'xai' and credential type as 'supergrok_oauth', the xai provider needs to route SuperGrok OAuth connections. Add tokenUrl and clientId to the xai provider config for refresh purposes.

5. Add SuperGrok token refresh to open-sse/executors/default.ts refreshCredentials() method: add 'xai' case that checks if credentials have refreshToken (indicating SuperGrok OAuth). Use refreshWithForm() posting to https://auth.x.ai/oauth2/token with grant_type=refresh_token, refresh_token, client_id.

6. Create a SuperGrok OAuth import route at src/app/api/oauth/supergrok/import/route.ts for headless flow: POST accepts { refreshToken } or { accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn }, validates the token by calling https://api.x.ai/v1/models, saves connection with provider='xai', authType='supergrok_oauth'. Follow the pattern from src/app/api/oauth/kiro/import/route.ts.

7. Update src/shared/constants/providers.ts: modify the xai entry to add 'supergrokOauth: true' flag and add a new section or modify xai serviceKinds to include 'image'. Also ensure it's clear that xAI supports both API key and SuperGrok OAuth.

8. Add xAI to IMAGE_PROVIDERS in open-sse/handlers/imageGenerationCore.ts: xai: { baseUrl: 'https://api.x.ai/v1/images/generations', format: 'xai-image' }. Add buildImageBody case for xAI that maps OpenAI size param to xAI aspect_ratio (1024x1024->1:1, 1792x1024->16:9, 1024x1792->9:16) and builds { model: body.model or 'grok-imagine-image', prompt, aspect_ratio, resolution: '1k' }. Add normalizeImageResponse case for xAI.
9. Add xAI image generation model to open-sse/config/providerModels.ts: add { id: 'grok-imagine-image', name: 'Grok Imagine Image', type: 'image' } to the xai array.
10. Add REFRESH_LEAD_MS entry for xai in open-sse/config/appConstants.ts (e.g. 5 minutes like codex).

11. Ensure the existing xAI provider validation in src/app/api/providers/validate/route.ts and src/app/api/providers/[id]/test/testUtils.ts handles both apiKey and accessToken (SuperGrok OAuth bearer token). The test should use Authorization: Bearer with either apiKey or accessToken.

12. Add security redaction: ensure that in any log or error response path for SuperGrok OAuth, tokens are masked. The existing log.maskKey pattern should be sufficient but verify no raw tokens leak in new code paths.
acceptance_criteria: SuperGrok OAuth authorize flow returns valid authUrl with correct params when GET /api/oauth/supergrok/authorize is called
SuperGrok OAuth token exchange works via POST /api/oauth/supergrok/exchange with code+codeVerifier
SuperGrok OAuth import headless flow works via POST /api/oauth/supergrok/import with refreshToken
Connections created with provider='xai' and authType='supergrok_oauth' route through xAI API using Bearer token
Token refresh for xAI SuperGrok OAuth connections posts to auth.x.ai/oauth2/token and updates credentials
xAI image generation with model grok-imagine-image works through /v1/images/generations endpoint
OpenAI size values are correctly mapped to xAI aspect_ratio: 1024x1024->1:1, 1792x1024->16:9, 1024x1792->9:16
Existing xAI API key flow continues to work unchanged
No raw tokens appear in logs or error responses
Project builds, typechecks, and lints without errors
findings: All verification commands pass (typecheck, lint, build). Tests pass except 1 pre-existing failure in governance-api-key-policy.test.ts (unrelated mock issue). The xAI image response format is already OpenAI-compatible so no special normalizeImageResponse case was needed. The xAI OAuth connections use authType='supergrok_oauth' which routes through testOAuthConnection (added xai entry to OAUTH_TEST_CONFIG with refreshable:true).
